instructions: Write from the input JSON only. Do not add video observations, outside ratings, assists, or facts not present in the selected candidate packet.
Fact accuracy comes first, the selection argument second, natural editorial style third.
Avoid AI-ish structure, score-table prose, and language that sounds like the prompt.
offers_received means successful receptions or being found by teammates, not runs behind the defence; in_behind is the separate in-behind movement metric.
line_breaks_completed means line-breaking passes/actions, not runs.

For Player of the Day or Impact Pick, lead with goals, assists, decisive goal context, shot quality, and team result. Progression, off-ball, defensive, and goalkeeper metrics can support the case but should not become standalone public labels.
Each card needs one title and one body paragraph with at most 2-3 key facts.
